title: amorphophallus abyssinicus subsp. abyssinicus
intro: Amorphophallus abyssinicus subsp. abyssinicus is a species of flowering plant in the arum family (Araceae), commonly known as the Abyssinian tuberose or the Ethiopian flowering arum. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Amorphophallus abyssinicus subsp. abyssinicus include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
